position_effect.Controlled: You act on your terms. Failure = reduced effect or complication, not harm.
position_effect.Risky: Standard engagement. Failure = complication + possible harm.
position_effect.Desperate: Serious danger. Failure = severe harm or worse position. Greater XP on success.

effect_levels.Limited: Reduced impact — partial progress, weak effect
effect_levels.Standard: Normal impact — expected result for the action
effect_levels.Great: Increased impact — extra progress, strong effect

action_roll.6: Full Success — you do it without complication
action_roll.4-5: Partial Success — you do it, but with a consequence
action_roll.1-3: Failure — things go badly, GM determines consequence

stress_and_trauma.Stress: 0-9 track. Pushing yourself, resisting, assisting costs stress.
stress_and_trauma.Trauma: At 9 stress: clear stress, gain 1 trauma. At 4 traumas: character retires.
stress_and_trauma.Resist: Roll 2d6. Stress cost = 6 minus highest die. Minimum 0.

downtime_actions.Acquire Asset: Roll tier to get a temporary asset (tool, vehicle, weapon)
downtime_actions.Long-Term Project: Tick progress clock toward a goal (4/6/8 segments)
downtime_actions.Recover: Heal harm by one level (or more with a critical)
downtime_actions.Reduce Heat: Remove 1 heat per success (or more with a critical)
downtime_actions.Train: Advance a skill or earn XP toward advancement
downtime_actions.Indulge Vice: Relieve stress (roll lowest action). Overindulge at 6+.

heat_and_wanted.Heat 6+: Wanted level increases by 1, heat resets to 0
heat_and_wanted.Wanted 4: Extreme — city-wide manhunt, arrest on sight
